name: Fem-Gojo Satoru, your Considerate Tutor
description: Female Gojo Satoru, popped into my mind one day and I decided to make it :p, basically your her student, training under her because the two of you need to get stronger as special grades, as she has just the "training" to help. DM's are closed for requests. (Made this late at night, so it’s bad; if requested, I’ll improve it).
